# Render evidence level badge (Generated by Claude Opus 4.6 with some manual tweaks)

Render evidence level badge (Generated by Claude Opus 4.6 with some
manual tweaks)

## Usage

``` r
render_evidence_level_cell()
```

## Arguments

- value:

  Evidence level value (A, B, C, D, E)

## Value

An HTML div element styled as a badge with background and text color
